zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN於1478年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓時，他的父親George de Beaumont Cole-Orton26歲，母親Johanna Pauncefort24歲。他於1499年與Mary Bassett在英國萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國艾可維文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN于1478年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓时，他的父亲George de Beaumont Cole-Orton26岁，母亲Johanna Pauncefort24岁。他于1499年与Mary Bassett在英国萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1538年在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国艾可維文。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN was born in 1478, in Coleorton, Leicestershire, England, his father, George de Beaumont Cole-Orton, was 26 and his mother, Johanna Pauncefort, was 24. He married Mary Bassett in 1499, in Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1538, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Wivenhoe, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN est né en 1478, à Coleorton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, George de Beaumont Cole-Orton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Johanna Pauncefort, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mary Bassett en 1499, à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1538, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Wivenhoe, Essex, Angleterre.

de.Orton on the Hill, Leicestershire, Engla: Orton on the Hill, Leicestershire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN 1478 in Coleorton, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater George de Beaumont Cole-Orton 26 und seine Mutter Johanna Pauncefort 24. Er hat 1499 in Leicestershire, England Mary Bassett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1538 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wivenhoe, Essex, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KNが1478年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコーレオルトンで生まれた時，父George de Beaumont Cole-Ortonは26歳，母Johanna Pauncefortは24歳であった。1499年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでMary Bassettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1538年に故郷で60歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスウィベンhオにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN(이)가 1478년 영국 레이스스터실르 콜리르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George de Beaumont Cole-Orton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Pauncefort(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1499년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 Mary Bassett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 위븐호에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN nasceu em 1478, em Coleorton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, George de Beaumont Cole-Orton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Pauncefort, tinha 24 anos. ru.Orton on the Hill, Leicestershire, Engla: ортон он т хилл, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William I De Beaumont 2nd Viscount, KN родился в 1478 г. в местности колеортон, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени George de Beaumont Cole-Orton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Pauncefort, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Bassett в 1499 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1538 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности вивено, эссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Mary Bassett en 1499, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas.
